title: pelargonium × allenii
intro: Pelargonium × allenii, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant pink or white flowers and attractive foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and enhance overall well-being.
